title: Marlow's Slendytubbies!
description: A mod that adds the monsters from Slendytubbies!
body:
# Marlow's Slendytubbies
![Tinky Tank stands at the most right of the screen while inside a dark, colorless version of the main land, a red mist covers the corners of the image, on the left of Tinky Tank, there's red text that says "Marlow's Slendytubbies"](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/a1ed2a71c84d661de122dd27c3ac35a906373216.png)
**Ever wanted to play ST3 Sandbox but.. fully expanded?**                  
**Well, look no further cause Marlow's Slendytubbies is here!** 

Time for teletubbies...

Marlow's Slendytubbies introduces (currently) 31/34 planned antagonistic monsters, food and other items from the game "Slendytubbies 3" by ZeoWorks and integrates these features into Minecraft, fusing ST3 Sandbox and Minecraft together to bring an even bigger sandbox to your table.

Keep in mind that these mobs are only available in creative mode or with commands.

<details>
<summary>The Current Roster</summary>


![The Roster (1.4)](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/c924dc27676e46d6b5a857d2eb11a794abbdbe70.png)



</details>


<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/hN9a-_ImUao" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>

## Credits
Developed by Pizzatuna_ in MCreator, not associated with ZeoWorks in any way.
